title: Windows read-only Codex delegations run with full-access sandboxing
description: src/delegations.rs maps read-only Codex delegations to CodexSandboxMode::DangerFullAccess on Windows to dodge the windows-sandbox spawn-setup failure, so a read-only reviewer child has full filesystem and network access via Codex-owned tools despite writePolicy readOnly. Fix: narrower Windows fallback or reject with a clear error; surface reduced enforcement in the UI; restore true read-only sandboxing once the upstream issue is fixed.

title: Cover orphan-thread suppression end-to-end
description: Add a test driving the shared-Codex setup waiter with the AppState record removed (and detach-first ordering) to prove suppress_orphaned_codex_thread fires on the waiter path; the current suppress_orphaned_codex_thread_blocks_discovery_reimport only exercises the helper in isolation, not the src/codex.rs waiter branch.

title: Extract delegation result parsing and synthesis helpers
description: Move result-packet parsing, plain-output synthesis, findings parsing, and summary compaction out of src/delegations.rs into a focused module.

title: Extract workspace session-reference helpers
description: Move session-reference collection, delegated-child reference detection, and adjacent reconciliation helpers out of ui/src/workspace.ts to stay below the active size threshold.

title: Keep Telegram prompt-target selectors in parity
description: Add a shared predicate or parity coverage if latest_project_prompt_target_session and find_latest_telegram_project_prompt_session diverge beyond their SessionRecord vs /api/state projection split.

title: Extract Telegram prompt-target forwarding tests
description: Move the delegated/error/unknown prompt-target resolution cluster out of src/tests/telegram_forwarding.rs before that file crosses the active size threshold.

title: Resolve flow.md placement
description: Decide whether the untracked review-flow note belongs under docs/, an ignore list, or stays local-only outside version control.

title: Extract delegation child-interaction detail helpers
description: Move child pending-interaction detail synthesis and parent-card refresh helpers out of src/delegations.rs into a focused delegation status module.

title: Re-enable read-only reviewer git -C / --git-dir behind git-env hardening
description: Repository-retargeting git global options were dropped from the read-only reviewer checker (a tracked bare-repo fixture .git/config core.fsmonitor/diff.external would exec). To restore, have TermAl neutralize the exec sinks in the reviewer child git env (e.g. GIT_CONFIG_COUNT with diff.external=, core.fsmonitor=, core.pager=cat), since the checker cannot rewrite the verbatim command. GIT_CONFIG_NOSYSTEM=1 does not help (system config only).

title: Collapse the four Codex reasoning-effort string parsers
description: parse_codex_reasoning_effort (runtime.rs), parse_discovered_codex_reasoning_effort (codex_discovery.rs), codex_reasoning_effort_from_json_value (state.rs), and the TERMAL_CODEX_REASONING_EFFORT match (turns.rs) each hand-maintain the same string map and silently drop unknowns (how max/ultra went missing). Route through one CodexReasoningEffort::from_api_value. The runtime path has coverage (codex_model_options_parses_max_and_ultra_reasoning_levels); discovery/state/env still lack direct tests, so add a shared parser test in the collapse.

title: Windows cargo test reads and overwrites the real ~/.termal
description: resolve_home_dir() (src/codex_home.rs:44) prefers HOME then USERPROFILE, but the harness overrides only USERPROFILE (TEST_HOME_ENV_KEY, src/tests/mod.rs:691); with HOME set (Git Bash) the override is bypassed so telegram tests hit the real ~/.termal. A plain cargo test overwrote telegram-bot.json (chatId 123) and poisons TEST_HOME_ENV_MUTEX (~30 cascade failures). Fix: honor the harness override before HOME in test builds and use a per-test temp home.

title: Running delegation status poll mutates the parent card revision
description: tests::delegations::delegation_status_and_unavailable_result_poll_preserve_revision_without_refresh fails: polling a running read-only delegation bumps revision 3 to 4 via parent-card detail refresh (creation writes a detailed running row; refresh wants the generic detail). Makes cargo test --bin termal red. Fix: align the created running detail with the no-op refresh matcher.

title: Claude turns finalize while background Task subagents are still running
description: src/claude_spawn.rs treats a {"type":"result"} stream message as end-of-turn, but Claude Code runs Task subagents in the background so result can arrive mid-work: the session shows idle and delegated reviewers return truncated packets (repro: session-3301 returned no findings while still compiling). Fix: track outstanding Task/tool-use ids and finalize only when none remain; until then treat a reviewer packet that admits pending work as failed.

title: Use a lighter persist for ignore-set-only mutations
description: suppress_orphaned_codex_thread and clear_external_session_id_if_runtime_matches commit via commit_locked, bumping revision and broadcasting SSE for a client-invisible ignored_discovered_codex_thread_ids change; a persist-without-revision path would avoid the needless client refresh.

title: Codex thread discovery can re-import an orphaned thread from a failed thread/start
description: A Codex thread/start that errors or times out can leave a thread on disk that startup discovery re-imports as a phantom, unlinked top-level session (no parentDelegationId). Remaining windows: thread/start timeout (id never learned) and persist failure (suppression needs the commit_locked that just failed). Fix: record the pending thread/start for kill/detach reconciliation, or give reviewer children a Codex home outside the discovery scopes. Ref import_discovered_codex_threads.
